basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Lathril as a BG Elf typal/tokens/drain Commander anchor.
EDHREC and public Commander deck pages label Lathril as a Commander deck commander.
cEDH evidence exists but is weaker; this profile defaults to casual Elf snowball.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Mana Elves count as both ramp and typal density for this profile.
Hard combo/cEDH signals are opt-in, not default casual recommendations.

themes.name: elf_typal_tokens_drain
themes.notes: Lathril rewards Elf count with tokens and table-drain pressure.

themes.name: tribal_ramp_go_wide
themes.notes: Elf mana engines accelerate both board development and overrun finishes.

themes.name: untap_combo_payoffs
themes.notes: Untap effects amplify Lathril and mana-Elf engines, but deterministic combos are power-gated.

examples: generic graveyard pile with low Elf count
avoid_patterns.reason: Lathril's payoff scales with Elf density and token count.

examples: multiple expensive overrun cards with too few early Elves
avoid_patterns.reason: The deck must first build a board and mana engine.

examples: hard combo shell without user power request
avoid_patterns.reason: cEDH relevance is weaker than casual/optimized Elf evidence.
